comment: Per-recipe currency metadata. Consumed by packages/signal/src/cli/snippets/matrix.ts at build time. Updated by the quarterly sweep documented in docs/internal/recipe-currency-sweep.md. Each recipe entry must be re-verified by an actual WebFetch of upstream_doc_url at sweep time — do NOT trust this file's snapshot for sweep audits.

next-app-router.canonical_pattern: Client Component with 'use client' directive, rendered as child boundary inside Server Layout. NOT a side-effect import from layout.tsx — the canonical pattern composes Client Components into Server Components, not via side effects.
next-app-router.notes: Next 16 ships React 19 canary; 'use client' directive unchanged. Min Node 20.9 (informational warning to user when detected Next ≥ 16).

next-pages-router.canonical_pattern: Side-effect import from pages/_app.tsx into a guarded module that checks typeof window !== 'undefined'.
next-pages-router.notes: Pages Router still maintained in Next 16 but App Router is the default for create-next-app.

react-router-v7.canonical_pattern: entry.client.tsx is the framework-conventions browser entry. Initialize browser-only libs there before/around hydrateRoot.
react-router-v7.notes: React Router v7 framework mode (formerly Remix). Distinct project from Remix v2 — separate detection by react-router@>=7.0.0 dep + (react-router.config.ts | app/entry.client.tsx) presence.

remix-v2.canonical_pattern: entry.client.tsx (exposed via `npx remix reveal` if not present). startTransition + hydrateRoot is the foundation; browser-only init goes in this file.
remix-v2.notes: Standalone Remix v2 product still maintained alongside React Router v7. Separate detection by @remix-run/* deps.

nuxt.canonical_pattern: plugins/<name>.client.ts file. The .client suffix isolates browser-only init from SSR.

sveltekit.canonical_pattern: +layout.svelte using Svelte 5 runes: `let { children } = $props()`; browser-only init via $effect (does NOT run on server) OR the `browser` import from $app/environment as a guard.
sveltekit.notes: Svelte 5 runes are standard. Svelte 4 reactive syntax (let / $:) still works but is no longer the canonical recipe. Wizard generates runes-first; manual recipes-doc retains a Svelte 4 fallback note.

plain-vue.notes: Composition API + <script setup> still recommended; entry-file pattern unchanged.

plain-svelte.canonical_pattern: src/main.ts side-effect import before mount(App, { target }). Svelte 5 mount() replaces the legacy `new App({ target })` constructor pattern.
plain-svelte.notes: For Vite-scaffolded projects without SvelteKit. Svelte 5 mount API is the runes-mode entry point.

plain-react.notes: Pre-existing pattern; no SSR concerns. Works for Vite, CRA (legacy), Parcel.

angular-standalone.canonical_pattern: main.ts: bootstrapApplication(AppComponent) from @angular/platform-browser. Side-effect import a signal-init module before the bootstrapApplication call. AppComponent must be standalone.
angular-standalone.notes: Standalone is default since Angular v17; v21 retains this. NgModule still works but ngmodule is the legacy fallback in our matrix.

angular-ngmodule.canonical_pattern: main.ts: platformBrowserDynamic().bootstrapModule(AppModule). Side-effect import a signal-init module before the bootstrapModule call.
angular-ngmodule.notes: Maintained for legacy Angular projects pre-standalone migration. Wizard surfaces a soft note suggesting the standalone migration when this pattern is detected.

vanilla.canonical_pattern: <script type="module"> tag in HTML, or import from main.js entry. No SSR concerns.
vanilla.notes: Stable forever. Spot-check at sweep time only.
